_comment: Operator brand routing. Each rule maps a cwd/transcript-path keyword (a case-insensitive regex) to a brand label; memories + the SessionStart banner are scoped by the inferred brand. First match wins; no match => no brand (the memory layer fails closed to brand-neutral). The default 'ai-ecosystem' rule covers THIS stack's own workspace. ADD YOUR OWN rules for your projects, e.g. {"pattern": "myapp|mycompany", "brand": "myapp"}. OPTIONAL: add a "campaign" field to sub-scope a brand into isolated funnels/sub-projects, e.g. {"pattern": "myfunnel", "brand": "myapp", "campaign": "myfunnel"} — a session then surfaces the brand's shared (campaign-less) canonical facts PLUS only its own campaign's rules, never another campaign's. Put campaign sub-rules BEFORE the broad brand rule (first match wins). This file is deployed to ~/.claude/scripts/brands.json on first install and NOT overwritten on re-install, so your customizations persist.
